roster.sum: Advanced Rigger (RA) specialising in structural steel erection, heavy lifts and dual-crane operations. 2023 Simpec Cockburn Cement CCL KWUP plant upgrade — advanced rigging across complex heavy-lift crew work; also April–May 2023 Civmec on Covalent Lithium Plant construction with JLG 60/135 and Genie 60 EWP experience. Prior 8 years at Ausgroup (2008–16) on structural steel erection, dual-crane lifts, complex load transfers and tank/structure installs. Traffic management crew leader 2019–23 in between rigging runs. Tickets: RA, LF, EWP, WAH, CS, Traffic Management, First Aid & CPR. Corbett Rhys and Hopla Sven listed as labour hire contingents.
